calendar.matters: Petition For Order To 1)Appoint Trustee Of Testamentary Trust; 2) For Recovery Of Testamentary Trust Funds, And 3) For Instructions To Make Outright Distributions To Beneficiaries Of Testamentary Trust

Petition For Order To 1)Appoint Trustee Of Testamentary Trust; 2) For Recovery Of Testamentary Trust Funds, And 3) For Instructions To Make Outright Distributions To Beneficiaries Of Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Continued To Sep-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ana Allec appeared via zoom for Edward Cowan (petitioner).
Elizabeth Dorsi appeared via zoom for Ellen Cowan and Douglas Cowan (objectors).

The Court addressed that no objections have been filed.

Ms. Dorsi stated that they are in settlement talks, that she filed a stipulation, and that they need more time to resolve the matter.

The matter is continued to September 9, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition For Order To 1)Appoint Trustee Of Testamentary Trust; 2) For Recovery Of Testamentary Trust Funds, And 3) For Instructions To Make Outright Distributions To Beneficiaries Of Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Apr-22-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ana Allec appeared via zoom for Edwad Cowan (petitioner).
Elizabeth Dorsi appeared via zoom for Ellen Cowan and Douglas Cowan (objectors).

Ms. Dorsi expressed that they are objecting to the petition and wish to file their objections. The matter is continued to June 3, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Written objections are to be filed within 30 days.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported
